initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Country c ON pa.player_fifa_api_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium';

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Country c ON p.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium';

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Country c ON pa.player_fifa_api_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium';

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Country c ON pa.player_fifa_api_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium';

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN Country c ON c.id = (
    SELECT country_id
    FROM Match
    WHERE home_player_1 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_2 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_3 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_4 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_5 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_6 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_7 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_8 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_9 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_10 = p.player_api_id
       OR home_player_11 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_1 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_2 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_3 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_4 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_5 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_6 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_7 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_8 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_9 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_10 = p.player_api_id
       OR away_player_11 = p.player_api_id
    LIMIT 1
)
WHERE c.name = 'Belgium';
